title: Echoic (EESA Subtest) - Level 1
description: Assessment of echoic behaviors utilizing the Early Echoic Skills Assessment (EESA).

title: Echoic 1-M
description: Scores at least 2 on the EESA subtest.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 2 or more on the EESA subtest. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 1 on the EESA subtest.

title: Echoic 2-M
description: Scores at least 5 on the EESA subtest.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 5 or more on the EESA subtest. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 3 on the EESA subtest.

title: Echoic 3-M
description: Scores at least 10 on the EESA subtest.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 10 or more on the EESA subtest. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 7 on the EESA.

title: Echoic 4-M
description: Scores at least 15 on the EESA subtest.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 15 or more on the EESA subtest. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 12 on the EESA subtest.

title: Echoic 5-M
description: Scores at least 25 on the EESA subtest (at least 20 from group 1).
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he scores 25 or more on the EESA subtest, with at least 20 from group 1. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he scores 20 on the EESA subtest with at least 15 from group 1.

title: Spontaneous Vocal Behavior - Level 1
description: Assessment of a child's spontaneous emission of speech sounds without prompts.

title: Vocal 1-M
description: Spontaneously emits an average of 5 speech sounds each hour.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he spontaneously emits an average of 5 speech sounds each hour. A time-sample type of data recording can be used to measure this behavior. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he spontaneously emits an average of 2 speech sounds each hour.

title: Vocal 2-M
description: Spontaneously emits 5 different sounds, averaging 10 total sounds each hour. (TO: 60 min.)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he spontaneously emits 5 different sounds, averaging 10 total sounds each hour. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he spontaneously emits 3 different sounds, averaging 10 total sounds each hour.
